title: #2476 - Shanna H. Swan
body_text:
Shanna H. Swan, PhD, is an environmental epidemiologist and author of “Count Down.” She is the director of The Action Science Initiative, a program within the Million Marker Institute, and is featured in the documentary “The Plastic Detox,” now streaming on Netflix.www.netflix.com/title/82074244www.simonandschuster.com/books/Count-Down/Shanna-H-Swan/9781982113674www.mmresearch.orgwww.shannaswan.com
